title: Pyrrosia micraster
taxonomy: Pyrrosia micraster is classified as a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Pyrrosia, which consists of various species of rhizomatous ferns. The family Polypodiaceae is a large group of ferns, comprising over 1,000 species. Pyrrosia micraster is native to the tropical regions of Asia, and its classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other ferns in the same family. The classification of Pyrrosia micraster is further supported by its morphological characteristics and molecular analysis.
uses: Pyrrosia micraster, also known as the small-spored Chinese shield fern, has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits.
